content:
Web-public channel created by Philip Durbin 🚀. Description:

For sysadmins and devops folks

Deirdre Kirmis changed the description for this channel.

  • Old description:

For sysadmins and devops folks

  • New description:

Channel for discussion among sysadmin and devops folks related to infrastructure, installation, configuration, performance, backups, monitoring, or anything related to keeping Dataverse running smoothly on the back-end.
